feature_split_remediation.app_runtime_path: Binaries and DuckDB-backed app/runtime tests now opt into app-runtime or duckdb-flight-recorder explicitly.
feature_split_remediation.default_feature_path: Default now resolves to runtime-full so existing public modules compile for default cargo tests instead of disappearing behind a stricter runtime-full gate.
feature_split_remediation.duckdb_decoupling: runtime-full excludes duckdb-flight-recorder, so kernel Postgres/API proof no longer compiles DuckDB/libduckdb-sys unless the proof explicitly asks for DuckDB.
feature_split_remediation.postgres_runtime: Live Postgres proof was run locally with POSTGRES_TEST_URL=postgres://postgres:postgres@127.0.0.1:5432/handshake_test; absence of that env remains ENVIRONMENT_BLOCKED, not PASS.
